case_title: GIANNI, LUKE VS DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GIANNI, LUKE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-30-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-28-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT. WAIVES NO SERVICE. SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,500.00 CONTINUED FOR PROGESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DIS- MISSED WITH PREDJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
